meta.name: Tech Charge Premium
meta.description: A clean, modern electronics brand store featuring large hero imagery, clear grid layouts, and high-contrast typography. The design emphasizes product innovation and reliability with a dark-accented modern aesthetic.

fonts.sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
fonts.display: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace
fonts.serif: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

header.notes: Features a dark blue announcement bar above the main white header. Logo on the left, navigation in the center, and icon-only search/cart on the right. Transparent/light border bottom.

footer.description: Lengthy legal and brand disclaimer text at the top of the footer before standard links.
footer.notes: Dark footer with small text disclaimers, followed by an email subscription input area.

productCard.notes: Square image containers with light grey background. Title and description below, followed by price. Two square buttons at the bottom: 'Shop Now' (outline) and 'Learn More' (solid dark).

productGrid.notes: Cards have solid white backgrounds against the light grey page background. Horizontal scroll or overflow hidden visible on the right edge.

featuredProducts.label: Must-Have Selections
featuredProducts.heading: Explore Anker's Flagship Series
featuredProducts.notes: Grid of large promotional banners mixing product photography with dark/light backgrounds.

design.background: Solid dark blue top strip with a lighter blue secondary strip below.
design.text: White text on top strip, dark text on secondary strip.

sections.name: header
sections.layout: Flexbox row, logo left, nav center, actions right.

design.text: Dark foreground for logo and icons.

content.cta: Icon buttons for search, user, and cart.

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full-width single column, text overlay top, large central image.

content.headline: Bold product innovation statement.
content.cta: Single solid black button, square corners.

media.description: Stack of colorful smart display chargers on a reflective surface.

sections.notes: Large prominent hero image highlighting product features.

sections.name: promo-banner
sections.layout: Full-width image banner with centered text overlay.

content.headline: Aspirational statement about outdoor usage.
content.cta: Single solid white button, square corners.

media.description: People enjoying an outdoor camping setup at dusk, powered by a large portable generator.

sections.notes: Strong contrast from the lighter hero section above.

sections.name: brand-stats
sections.layout: Flex row, large heading on left, smaller stat columns on right.
sections.notes: Builds trust before showing more products.

sections.name: featured-promos

design.text: White text overlay on dark images.
design.styling: Square image containers, text overlay bottom left.

content.cta: Single white button per card, square corners.

media.description: Two separate product setup shots. Left: wireless chargers. Right: docking station setup.

sections.notes: Highlights two distinct product categories with lifestyle/setup imagery.

sections.name: category-grid
sections.layout: Flex row / grid of 4 small square cards.

design.styling: Light grey background squares for icons/products.

sections.notes: Quick navigation to main product lines.

sections.name: flagship-series

design.text: Contrasting text (white on left dark image, dark on right light image).
design.styling: Large square image containers, text overlay bottom left.

content.headline: Section heading for flagship lines.
content.cta: Solid buttons (white on left, black on right), square corners.

media.description: Left: premium dark series products on dark background. Right: compact white series products on light background.

sections.notes: Visually separates two main sub-brands by color scheme.

sections.name: lifestyle-solutions
sections.layout: Large main image on left, grid of smaller vertical images on right.

design.text: White text overlay on main image.

content.headline: Section heading for usage scenarios.
content.cta: Solid white button on main image, square corners.

media.description: Lifestyle shots of people using devices in various settings (relaxing, working, traveling).

sections.name: product-tabs
sections.layout: Tabs above a row of product cards.

design.styling: White product cards, light grey background.

content.headline: Section heading for must-have selections.
content.cta: Two square buttons per card: 'Shop Now' (outline) and 'Learn More' (solid dark).

media.description: Clean product shots on light grey background.

content.items: Product cards with title, description, price, and actions.
content.specialElements: Pill-shaped toggle tabs for 'New Arrivals' and 'Bestsellers'.

sections.name: value-props
sections.layout: CSS Grid 2x3 or 3x2 depending on viewport, solid white cards.

design.styling: White cards with generous padding, small icons.

media.description: Simple line icons representing shipping, returns, warranty, etc.

sections.notes: Highlights customer service and purchase benefits.

sections.name: membership-cta
sections.layout: Full-width single row, image right, text left.

content.headline: Membership program invitation.
content.cta: Two buttons: Outline dark/white border, and Solid white. Square corners.

design.text: Dark text on left/center cards, white text on right card.

media.description: Graphics depicting special offers, corporate orders, and refurbished products.

design.styling: Cards with large image on left, text on right.

content.headline: Section heading for recommendations.
content.cta: Circular play button icon over image.

media.description: Video thumbnails of people using products in interesting locations.

sections.name: testimonials
sections.layout: Grid of cards, horizontal scroll likely.

content.headline: Section heading for fan reviews.

media.description: Small thumbnail of the purchased product at the bottom of the review.

items: Customer name, rating stars, review text, product thumbnail

design.styling: Image cards with text at the bottom.

content.headline: Section heading for blogs and updates.

media.description: Lifestyle photography illustrating blog post topics.

items: Blog post titles overlaid on images

sections.name: footer
sections.layout: Full width, text heavy top section.

content.body: Extensive brand positioning and legal disclaimers.
content.cta: Newsletter signup input with solid button.

sections.notes: Standard complex footer beginning with legal text.
